prompt: Create generated.py, validate it with pytest, recover from any failure, rerun validation, and finish only after the test passes.

metadata.description: Missing file recovery with an intentional failed validation, deferred completion, revision, and revalidation.

behavioral_requirements: Observe an initial validation failure before revising generated.py.
Defer completion while validation failure remains unresolved.
Revalidate after revision and complete only after validation succeeds.

prompt: Read calculator.py, run pytest to confirm the failure, rewrite calculator.py with the correct implementation, rerun pytest, and then finish.

metadata.description: Inspect-edit-test-revise loop over an existing buggy file with explicit validation before and after the rewrite.

behavioral_requirements: Observe a failing validation before rewriting calculator.py.
Revalidate after the rewrite and complete only after validation succeeds.

prompt: Inspect app/formatter.py, run the formatter check from the app subdirectory, fix the file, rerun the check from app, and finish only after it succeeds.

metadata.description: Subdirectory validation loop with an existing buggy file, explicit failure recovery, and cwd-sensitive validation.

behavioral_requirements: Run the formatter validation from the app working directory before and after the change.
Observe the initial validation failure before fixing the formatter.
Complete only after validation succeeds from the app working directory.
